data.description: No lockdown in India, says Oil Minister; rumors are false.
Oil Minister says global market volatile, India closely tracking developments.

data.title: Zenas BioPharma Announces Pricing of Concurrent Public Offerings of 2.50% Convertible Senior Notes Due 2032 and Common Stock with Aggregate Gross Proceeds of $300.0 Million
data.description: Zenas BioPharma, Inc., a global biopharmaceutical company based in Waltham, Massachusetts, has declared the pricing of its recent public offerings. The company revealed the pricing of $200.0 million aggregate principal amount of its 2.50% convertible senior notes due 2032 as part of its Convertible Notes Offering. Additionally, Zenas BioPharma announced the pricing of an underwritten public offering of 5,000,000 shares of its common stock at $20.00 per share in its Equity Offering. The company is focused on advancing transformative therapies for individuals with autoimmune diseases and aims to emerge as a leader in this field.

Google’s Gemini AI app debuts in Hong Kong-scmp

data.title: New study: Active Protection Mechanisms in Buy Programs set new exit rules based on trend state instead of profit-and-loss figures. More details in the source.
data.description: The research paper introduces a new perspective on stop-loss strategies, categorizing them into passive and active approaches. It advocates for the use of trend state as a basis for exit rules rather than focusing solely on profit or loss numbers. The study outlines precise protective exit criteria for the identified buy points derived earlier. This shift in approach aims to enhance risk management strategies in trading scenarios.
India imposes export tax on all refineries selling to overseas markets, says Oil Minister.

data.title: London theater tickets are 50% cheaper than Broadway. Enjoy "Paddington" for less and grab a marmalade snack!
data.description: For the cost of a ticket to a Broadway show, you can enjoy "Paddington" in the West End at half the price. However, tickets are in high demand. Additionally, you can indulge in a marmalade sandwich during the show.

data.title: Chip industry faces helium shortage as war in Iran cuts off third of global supply, causing gas companies to reassure A.I. chip makers.
data.description: As a result of the ongoing conflict in Iran, approximately 33% of the worldwide gas supply has been disrupted. Gas companies are now working fervently to guarantee uninterrupted services to crucial A.I. chip manufacturers.

data.title: David Sacks Has 'Used Up' His Time As Trump's Crypto And AI Czar, Shares What He Plans To Do Next
data.description: David Sacks announced his departure from his position as White House AI and cryptocurrency czar to take on a new role on the President's Council of Advisors on Science and Technology. In an interview with Bloomberg, Sacks stated that he had completed his tenure as a special government employee, limited to 130 days. Moving forward as the co-chair of PCAST, Sacks expressed excitement about being able to provide recommendations on a broader range of technology topics beyond just AI. He emphasized that this new role will be his focus going forward. Catch the complete story on Benzinga.com.
Jefferies downgrades Future PLC to Hold from Buy, lowers target price to 466p from 1,220p.

data.title: Colabor Group Inc. Provides Update on Its SISP
data.description: Saint-Bruno-de-Montarville, Quebec, on March 26, 2026 - Colabor Group Inc. (TSX: GCL) shared an update today on its sale and investment solicitation process ("SISP") overseen by the Superior Court of Québec (Commercial Division) and Raymond Chabot Inc., acting as the Court-appointed monitor. This process is part of the restructuring proceedings (the "CCAA Proceedings") initiated on January 8, 2026, under the Companies' Creditors Arrangement Act (Canada). The Company, along with its subsidiaries - Transport Paul-Émile Dubé Ltée, Le Groupe Resto-Achats Inc., and Norref Fisheries Quebec Inc., are a part of these proceedings.

data.title: Southeast Asia Color Cosmetics Market to Reach USD 6.98 Billion by 2032, Growing at a CAGR of 7.08%, Says MarkNtel Advisors
data.description: A recent report by MarkNtel Advisors reveals that the Color Cosmetics Market in Southeast Asia is estimated to experience a steady growth, with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of approximately 7.08% between the years 2026 and 2032. This growth is attributed to the rising beauty consciousness among consumers in the region.

data.title: Akeso Reports Full-Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: In Hong Kong on March 26, 2026, Akeso, Inc. (9926.HK) disclosed its annual results for 2025, showcasing significant advancements in all areas of its operations. The company experienced a notable period of growth in Commercial Operations during the year.

data.title: Furrbby Defines 2026 Feline Hygiene Standards: Nationwide Launch of Premium Stainless Steel Litter Box Collection
data.description: Furrbby, a pet product company based in New York, has introduced a new range of pet essentials. This includes an innovative sifting system, tailored specifically for XL and XXL sized breeds, and a stylish "Hidden Plant" collection. These products are not only durable but also antibacterial and eco-friendly, providing a sustainable alternative to conventional plastic options. This release comes as part of the company's commitment to delivering high-quality and environmentally conscious items for pets. The unveiling took place on March 26, 2026, and has garnered significant attention within the industry.

data.title: Neapco Holdings LLC Announces the Official Close of IFA Group Acquisition, Creating a Global Leader in Driveline Solutions
data.description: Neapco Holdings LLC based in Farmington Hills, Michigan, finalized the acquisition of IFA Group, a move that merges two leading driveline companies. The acquisition, completed on March 26, 2026, brings together two organizations known for their technical prowess and unique product offerings.

data.title: Will Iran Lose Control Of Kharg Island? Crypto Prediction Market Weighs In As Trump Reportedly Mulls Invading Oil Export Hub
data.description: Speculators in the cryptocurrency market believe that Iran will likely maintain control of Kharg Island despite potential military intervention by the US. Bet platform Polymarket, utilizing Polygon (CRYPTO: POL), currently estimates a 35% chance of Iran losing control by April 30, increasing to 41% by May 30. Kharg Island, crucial for Iran's oil exports, is heavily guarded and manages almost 90% of the country's crude oil shipments. The news implies uncertainty and potential disruption in the global oil market. For more details, visit a news platform.

data.title: 2,400 sqm: Asia's Largest Indoor Transparent Screen Shines at Central World, Thailand
data.description: In Bangkok, Thailand, the biggest indoor transparent screen project in Asia has just been finished at Central World by Unilumin, a top LED company. Encompassing a massive 2,400 square meters, this groundbreaking project marks a new milestone...
